overall.description: A first-person perspective train ride through the Night City Area Rapid Transit system in Cyberpunk 2077. The journey travels through underground tunnels, elevated stations, and neon-lit urban canyons at night, showcasing the game's futuristic cyberpunk architecture and vibrant billboard advertisements.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a narrow concrete transit tunnel with artificial lighting. The train moves forward through the curved underground passage, with smooth walls and ceiling visible through the window.

segments.scene_description: The train arrives at the NCART station, revealing a platform with distinctive teal walls, white benches, and illuminated advertisements. The large station signage becomes visible as the train slows, passing vending machines and route maps before preparing to exit.

segments.scene_description: The train bursts out of the station into the open night air, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of the Night City skyline. Neon billboards and towering skyscrapers fill the view as the train travels along elevated tracks, passing rooftops with solar panels and industrial equipment.

segments.scene_description: The train enters a narrow urban canyon between towering skyscrapers, with buildings passing closely on both sides. Bright yellow neon lights and illuminated office windows create a canyon-like effect as the train speeds through the dense city center.

segments.scene_description: The track descends to a lower level, revealing a street with moving traffic below. A large 'nicola' billboard dominates the right side as the train curves along the winding track, passing under building overhangs and alongside structural supports.

segments.scene_description: The train enters a dark tunnel section, with visibility dropping significantly. Occasional ceiling lights flash by as the train travels through the underground passage, with lights becoming visible ahead as the train approaches the next station platform.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the claustrophobic confines of an underground transit tunnel into the sprawling, neon-lit expanse of a futuristic metropolis. It begins gliding through a narrow concrete passage with artificial lighting, following the curve of the subterranean walls. As the train slows, the environment opens into an NCART station characterized by teal walls, white benches, and glowing advertisements. The scene then bursts out of the station into the open night air, revealing a panoramic skyline of towering skyscrapers and vibrant billboards as the tracks elevate above industrial rooftops. Finally, the view narrows again as the train plunges into a dense urban canyon, speeding between skyscrapers illuminated by bright yellow neon lights and glowing office windows.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the train descends from a vibrant urban street into the oppressive darkness of an underground tunnel. It begins by gliding downward toward a busy street filled with moving traffic, curving along a winding track beneath building overhangs and structural supports. As the train rounds the bend, a massive Nicola billboard dominates the right side of the frame before the open city view abruptly vanishes. The scene then shifts into a dark tunnel where visibility drops significantly, with only occasional ceiling lights flashing past in the gloom. Finally, the oppressive blackness begins to recede as the glow of the next station platform emerges in the distance.
